entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: Recruitment Democratization
entities.context: Core belief that the future of recruitment lies in empowering non-professionals with professional-grade data tools

entities.name: Data Superiority
entities.context: Professional-grade data and workflows that traditionally gave recruiters an information monopoly

entities.name: Human Capital Brokerage
entities.context: Vision of platform as financial instrument for talent, not traditional SaaS utility

entities.name: DeFi
entities.context: Referenced as analogous structural trend in finance - removing gatekeepers by arming participants

entities.name: Creator Platforms
entities.context: Referenced as analogous structural trend in media - removing gatekeepers

entities.name: Transaction-Based Brokerage Model
entities.context: Target business model measuring success by commission volume claimed by non-recruiters

entities.name: Shareable Data Superiority
entities.context: Product development priority over internal recruiter efficiency

relationships.context: Core strategic position for Careerspan's product direction
Vision for platform to transition from SaaS to brokerage
Follows same structural trend of removing centralized intermediaries
